business.noir: I'm Prateek Sharma, a freelance developer who builds websites, custom tools, and admin flows for businesses that want something practical and maintainable.
facts: LOCATION // Based in India, working remotely
business.light: I'm Prateek Sharma, a freelance developer who builds websites, custom tools, and simple admin flows for businesses that want something practical and maintainable.
factsNoir: Custom websites with a low-friction handoff.
Delivering working products directly to clients.
Performance and usability kept in focus.

developer.noir: I'm Prateek Sharma, a developer focused on web applications, interface quality, and practical AI-assisted workflows. I prefer clear structure, dependable delivery, and systems that are easy to maintain.
facts: SYSTEM // Web apps built with clear structure
VELOCITY // Fast prototypes and dependable delivery
LOCATION // Based in India, working remotely
developer.light: I'm Prateek Sharma, a developer focused on web applications, interface quality, and practical AI-assisted workflows. I like solving real problems with simple structure and dependable delivery.
factsNoir: Working with clear structure and a small technical footprint.
Turning rough ideas into working interfaces.
Keeping maintainability in view from the start.

business.title: Landing Page Package
business.description: A focused single-page website with a clear message, responsive layout, and contact flow.

business.title: Custom Web Application
business.description: A multi-page application with Supabase-backed data, admin tools, and project-specific workflows.

business.title: Monthly Support & SEO
business.description: Ongoing maintenance, content updates, and periodic performance checks.

developer.title: Hourly Consulting
developer.description: One-on-one development, debugging, and architecture support.

developer.title: Architecture Review
developer.description: A technical review of structure, data flow, and caching behavior.

developer.title: Codebase Security Audit
developer.description: A practical review of secrets, access control, and common exposure points.

summary.ai: Builds AI-assisted workflows, content pipelines, and automation tools that make recurring tasks easier to run and review.
summary.general: Builds web applications and interactive interfaces with attention to clear structure, performance, and maintainability.
summary.creative: Designs responsive interfaces with careful motion, layout, and visual hierarchy.
summary.fullstack: Builds full-stack web systems with Next.js, Flask, FastAPI, and Supabase, with attention to data flow and reliability.

quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront, 30% after design/milestone 1, 20% on final delivery.

bullets.ai: Built LLM-assisted workflows for content drafting, OCR, and project analysis using Gemini-based tooling.
bullets.general: Designed and shipped web platforms, simulation tools, and mobile utilities using React, Next.js, Flutter, and Python.
bullets.creative: Translated visual layouts into responsive interfaces with motion and custom CSS.
bullets.fullstack: Built API layers in Flask and FastAPI and connected them to PostgreSQL and Supabase data models.

bullets.ai: Used AI-assisted tools to prototype features quickly and keep repetitive work low.
bullets.general: Improved website performance and navigation with Lenis scrolling and viewport-linked motion.
bullets.creative: Translated visual layouts into responsive interfaces with motion and custom CSS.
bullets.fullstack: Programmed offline-capable data layers with Drift and SQLite for mobile apps that keep working without network coverage.

bullets.ai: Built a Gemini-assisted tool for OCR, draft generation, and repo analysis.
bullets.general: Built PrateekSync AI, a local content manager for portfolio updates, credential review, and generated drafts.
bullets.creative: Built an interactive Streamlit dashboard for managing skills, certificates, and media assets.
bullets.fullstack: Built a Python-based content manager with Streamlit, GitHub API integration, and TypeScript file sync.

lastSynced.summary: Published blog post: Unlock Your Career: AI-Powered Portfolio & Resume Automation with Structured Prompting
